prompt: Logo design on transparent background with NO background color at all. A perfect circle with a thick yellow (#FAFA00) border ring (about 5% of diameter thickness). Inside the circle is transparent/empty. In the center, the letters 'MM' in bold white uppercase. CRITICAL: The typeface must be a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold or Eurostile Bold Extended — wide letterforms, thick rectangular strokes, sharp 90-degree corners, minimal counter space. No other text, no tagline. Just the yellow ring circle with blocky MM in white inside. Clean vector quality, perfectly centered, razor sharp edges, flat design. PNG with alpha transparency, no background whatsoever.
negative_prompt: background color, solid background, black background, white background, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, 3D, complex, busy, decorative, serif font, script font, thin lines, rounded font, soft font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, tagline, extra text, grunge, noise, texture, multiple fonts, mixed typefaces
